APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar Mar-07-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INCORPORATED'S APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER (CHAMLOU CLAUDE GHIAL) IS granted. No Opposition was filed. Writ of Attachment to issue in the amount of $8,275.96. The attorneys' fees included in the Writ were reduced by $300 since no opposition was filed and no hearing is required.
